title: Geonosian hydra

The '''Geonosian hydras''' were huge carnivorous [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] creatures with three heads, though some hydras could have more than three—which would not be considered a [[Mutant|mutation]]. Hydras were amphibious and lived beneath the few seas on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], like the [[Ebon Sea]].

Geonosian hydras preyed upon less defended [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] hives. They were sometimes used as the main event in Geonosian [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiatorial]] fights, where they would be pitted against a large number of armed gladiators.

A Geonosian hydra [[exoskeleton]] was displayed inside the [[Royal Icqui Aquaria]], a large, public aquarium that was situated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
